_note: Derived from images/manifest.json's scenario_front rows (v5 #05b). One scenario, Varied Terrains, has no scenario_back in the manifest - the tile only ever shows the front (#04), so that absence has no effect here. Difficulty added by phase-4 #20: transcribed verbatim from the Spirit Island Wiki, 2026-07-13 — the List_of_Scenarios page cross-checked against each ambiguous scenario's own page (Second Wave, Powers Long Forgotten, Elemental Invocation, Destiny Unfolds, Surges of Colonization). Qualified values (1*, -1*, +/- 1) are kept verbatim, not collapsed to numbers. The wiki prints one +2/+7 for Surges of Colonization; the two rows here split it normal/larger per that page's LARGER SURGES (HIGHER DIFFICULTY) rules text. Fetch trail in .scratch/phase-4/issues/20-scenario-difficulty.md. Expansion added by legibility-pass #02: the raw string transcribed verbatim from each scenario's own Spirit Island Wiki page (its 'Part of the ___ Expansion' / 'Part of the Base Game' line) — same convention as other-cards/power-cards/adversaries, resolved through normalizeExpansion()'s EXPANSION_ALIASES rather than pre-collapsed here. A Diversity of Spirits and Varied Terrains print 'Part of Promo Pack 2' on their own pages but are category-tagged Feather and Flame (the retail box that later absorbed that promo content); 'Promo Pack 2' resolves to Feather & Flame per the owner's legibility-pass #01 call (Promo2/Promo Pack 2 always resolves to Feather & Flame). Fetch trail in .scratch/legibility-pass/scenario-expansions-research.md.
